summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Avantis U.S. Large Cap Value ETF (AVLV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of US large-cap value companies selected based on fundamental criteria. AVLV was launched on Sep 21, 2021 and is issued by American Century Investments.

data.title: Inside the ETF Industry's Record-Breaking First Half of the Year
data.text: The first half of 2026 capped a historic stretch for the ETF industry. Despite global returns struggling and macro uncertainties sending equities down 0.9% in June, assets poured into U.S.-listed ETFs...

holdings.infoBox: AVLV is an equity ETF with a total of 274 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 3.04%, Apple at 3.03%, Amazon.com at 2.74%, Meta Platforms at 2.57%, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.16%.
